# True-positive secret samples (must be DETECTED by secret-scan.sh).
# Full tokens are NOT stored here — construct at runtime in tests to avoid
# triggering GitHub Push Protection. These are shape references only.
#
# AWS Access Key ID:      AKIA + 16 uppercase alphanumerics
# Anthropic API Key:      sk-ant- + 90+ [A-Za-z0-9-]
# GitHub PAT:             ghp_ + 36 alphanumerics
# Slack Bot Token:        xoxb- + digits - digits - alphanumerics
# Inline assignment:      api_key = "....8+ chars...."
